changes: Added implementation notes: Successfully implemented all four auth error screens with comprehensive user guidance

file_insights.analysis: Newly created 253-line error handling screen with comprehensive user guidance
features: Lock person icon for visual feedback
Recovery guidance section with primary/secondary actions
Sign up link for user_not_found scenarios

file_insights.analysis: Newly created 291-line network error screen with advanced features

features: Countdown timer with formatted time display (hours/minutes/seconds)
Retry button enabled when countdown completes
User-friendly tips for avoiding rate limits
Lock clock icon for visual feedback

patterns_discovered: Consistent Material3 design system implementation across all auth error screens
Reusable auth_navigation_provider for navigation across screens
Standardized error handling approach using AuthErrorHandler
Responsive layout patterns with SingleChildScrollView for scrollable content
Consistent button styling and spacing (16px vertical spacing)
Icon-based visual feedback for different error types
Themed color scheme usage for error states (theme.colorScheme.error)
Container-based card layouts for guidance sections
gotchas_discovered: NetworkErrorScreen requires actual connectivity package implementation (currently simulated)
Proper timer cleanup in dispose() method for periodic network checks
State management for mounted widgets before timer operations
Error message customization through optional parameters
Callback pattern for parent component interactions

approach_outcome.implementation_approach: Created dedicated, user-friendly error screens with comprehensive guidance
approach_outcome.user_experience_focus: High - All screens include recovery guidance, troubleshooting tips, and multiple action options
approach_outcome.technical_quality: High - Consistent architecture, proper state management, and navigation integration
approach_outcome.completeness: Complete - All acceptance criteria met with additional features like offline mode and countdown timers

recommendations: Implement actual network connectivity checking using connectivity_plus package
Consider adding analytics tracking for error screen usage patterns
Add unit tests for all error screen components
Consider implementing error screen theming for different app themes
Add accessibility features for screen readers on error messages
